title: qRT-PCR (SYBR Green)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"asqll","text":"Quantitative reverse-transcription PCR (qRT-PCR) to measure relative gene expression using TRIzol RNA extraction, PrimeScript‱ RT Master Mix, and SYBR‱ Green on a 96-well real-time instrument (e.g., StepOnePlus‱). Analysis by 2^-ΔΔCT with melt-curve confirmation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":125,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":150,"length":1},{"key":2,"offset":210,"length":1}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"50AE2376A9F311F09F220A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}},"1":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"50AE23A9A9F311F09F220A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}},"2":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"50AE23D6A9F311F09F220A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}}}}
guidelines:
{"blocks":[{"key":"29l31","text":"Pause Points:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":13}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"59u4o","text":"- RNA stable at −80 °C.
- cDNA stable at −20 °C.
- Pre-run plate: keep on ice.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4kb14","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4c69d","text":"Troubleshooting:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"860u8","text":"- Low RNA yield: ensure clean separation, avoid overdrying.
- Multiple melt peaks: increase annealing temp, redesign primers.
- High variability: mix reagents well, centrifuge plate.
- NTC amplification: replace reagents, check contamination.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5rtj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8jh1f","text":"Record Keeping:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e8c1t","text":"Record RNA purity, input amounts, primer sequences, plate map, run file, and ΔΔCT calculations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"c6jdh","text":"- Pre-cool a centrifuge to 4 °C.\n- Thaw reagents on ice; mix and briefly spin.\n- Design primers (amplicon 70–200 bp; Tm ~60 °C when possible).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"8cics","text":"- Work RNase-free (gloves, RNase-free plastics).\n- TRIzol‱, chloroform, and isopropanol are hazardous—use in a fume hood.\n- Keep samples on ice unless otherwise specified.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":57,"length":1}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"3A31E663A9F311F0BD070A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}}}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"eiegk","text":"Instruments: NanoDrop, PCR thermal cycler, real-time PCR system (96-well), plate centrifuge.\nConsumables: Pipettes/tips, RNase-free tubes, 96-well qPCR plates, optical seals.\nReagents: TRIzol‱ Reagent; chloroform; isopropanol; 70% ethanol (RNase-free); RNase-free water; PrimeScript‱ RT Master Mix (TAKARA RR036A); SYBR‱ Green Universal Master Mix (Applied Biosystems 4309155); forward/reverse primers.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":191,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":282,"length":1},{"key":2,"offset":319,"length":1}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"49BB6DE3A9F311F09F220A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}},"1":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"49BB6E19A9F311F09F220A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}},"2":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"49BB6E5DA9F311F09F220A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}}}}
steps: Lyse/Homogenize: Add 1 mL TRIzol per 50–100 mg tissue or 5–10×10^6 cells. Homogenize thoroughly; incubate 5 min at RT.
Phase Separation: Add 0.2 mL chloroform per 1 mL TRIzol, vortex 10 s, incubate 10 min at RT. Centrifuge 12,000×g, 10 min, 4 °C. Transfer aqueous phase.
RNA Precipitation: Add 0.5 mL isopropanol per 1 mL TRIzol, invert gently, incubate 10 min RT. Centrifuge 12,000×g, 10 min, 4 °C.
Wash: Wash pellet 3× with 70% ethanol, centrifuge each time. Air-dry 30 min RT.
Resuspend & QC: Dissolve in 50 µL RNase-free water, measure purity (A260/A280 > 1.8). Store at −80 °C.
Reaction (20 µL): 1 µg RNA, 4 µL 5× PrimeScript RT Mix, water to 20 µL. Program: 37 °C 15 min, 85 °C 5 s, 4 °C hold. Dilute to 100 µL, store at −20 °C.
Reaction mix (10 µL): 5 µL SYBR Mix, 1 µL cDNA, 0.5 µL primers each, 3 µL water. Set up triplicates, NTCs. Seal, centrifuge plate.

Option A (Tm ≥ 60 °C): 50 °C 2 min; 95 °C 2 min; 40× (95 °C 15 s, 60 °C 1 min). Option B (Tm < 60 °C): 50 °C 2 min; 95 °C 2 min; 40× (95 °C 15 s, 55–60 °C 15 s, 72 °C 1 min). Melt Curve: 95 °C 15 s; 60 °C 1 min; slow ramp to 95 °C.
5. Confirm single melt peak. Plot in Prism.
creator: Jackson Schumacher
